mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `petlog`.`inquiry` (user_id, title, content, status, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{status}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT `id`, `user_id` AS `userId`, `title`, `content`, `status`, `answer`, `created_at` AS `createdAt`, `updated_at` AS `updatedAt` FROM `petlog`.inquiry WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT `id` AS `id`, `user_id` AS `userId`, `title` AS `title`, `content` AS `content`, `status` AS `status`, `answer` AS `answer`, `created_at` AS `createdAt`, `updated_at` AS `updatedAt` FROM `petlog`.`inquiry` ORDER BY `created_at` DESC
